name: Robotic Arm Simulator
short_description: Control real-time physical simulation control and transform into a robotic arm operator. Challenging millimeter level grasping tasks in multiple precision industrial scenarios, any operational jitter could trigger a chain of disasters!
detailed_description:
You are a robotic arm operator controlling multifunctional mechanical arms through real-time physics simulation in meticulously designed industrial scenarios, tackling high-precision grabbing and placement challenges! In the game, you must master grab-balancing techniques, combine patience with bated breath, and solve increasingly complex engineering puzzles.

Key Features

🔧 Realistic physics control system

🔧 Multiple mechanical arm models

🔧 The agony of dropped items

Developed with passion by Kuokuo, we hope to bring you joy!
